name: Qwen3.5-Plus
archDisplay: Hosted product tier of the Qwen3.5 hybrid-attention MoE line (Gated DeltaNet + Gated Attention + MoE, Qwen3-Next lineage); exact parameter/expert configuration for the specific hosted 'Plus' checkpoint undisclosed
note: Hosted/API counterpart to the open-weight Qwen3.5-397B-A17B, launched the same day via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio with a 1M-token default context, official built-in tools, and adaptive tool use on top of the open-weight base.

specSources.releaseDate: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3.6 (README changelog, matches CNBC's Feb 17 coverage of the joint launch)

results.notes: Qwen3.5-Plus-NoThinking, used as the baseline column in the Qwen3.5-Omni launch blog's text-benchmark table

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via the official qwen.ai launch blog (which announces the open-weight 397B-A17B and the hosted Plus tier together) and the official Alibaba Cloud Model Studio pricing page, which lists a versioned snapshot 'qwen3.5-plus-2026-02-15' with explicit tiered pricing ($0.40/$2.40 per M for 0-256K, $0.50/$3.00 for 256K-1M, International) -- used the base tier. Independent corroboration: a third-party review (medium.com/@leucopsis, 'Qwen3.5-Plus Review') and CNBC's coverage of the joint launch both place the release at Feb 16-17, 2026, consistent with the official GitHub changelog date of 2026-02-16 (the pricing page's internal snapshot suffix of '2026-02-15' is a 1-day variance, likely a timezone/versioning artifact, common across this vendor's other Plus-tier entries in this corpus e.g. Qwen3.7-Plus). Benchmark results are only available as the 'NoThinking' baseline used in a later Qwen3.5-Omni comparison table (self-reported, single primary source) -- no independently-corroborated third-party score could be found in this pass; flagged as lower-confidence than the open-weight sibling's results. Architecture/params undisclosed for this hosted tier specifically, consistent with corpus convention for all Plus/Max hosted variants (Qwen3-Max, Qwen3.7-Max, Qwen3.7-Plus).
